related_stage_3_architecture_constraints: Generated outputs reference quote and pricing snapshots
Import Service is separate from Asset Library Service

screen_inventory.name: Dashboard
screen_inventory.purpose: Show operational status, recent imports, margin alerts, quote activity, and next actions.

screen_inventory.name: Supplier List
screen_inventory.purpose: Search, filter, create, and monitor suppliers.

screen_inventory.name: Supplier Detail
screen_inventory.purpose: View supplier profile, source records, notes, import history, and actions.

screen_inventory.name: Import Review Wizard
screen_inventory.purpose: Upload, map, validate, and commit product or service records.

screen_inventory.name: Asset Library
screen_inventory.purpose: Search and manage products, services, documents, categories, and collections.

screen_inventory.name: Asset Detail
screen_inventory.purpose: Edit product/service details, costs, supplier provenance, documents, and usage.

screen_inventory.name: Pricing Workspace
screen_inventory.purpose: Preview pricing rules, costs, margins, alerts, and approval needs.

screen_inventory.name: Bundle And Recipe Builder
screen_inventory.purpose: Compose products, services, labor, shipping, packaging, and setup into reusable offerings.

screen_inventory.name: Quote List
screen_inventory.purpose: Search, filter, create, and track quote lifecycle states.

screen_inventory.name: Quote Builder
screen_inventory.purpose: Create customer quotes, add lines, review margins, approve, generate, and share.

screen_inventory.name: Customer Detail
screen_inventory.purpose: Manage customer profile, contacts, pricing profile, and quote history.

screen_inventory.name: Status Center
screen_inventory.purpose: Review background jobs, errors, retries, and operational diagnostics.

screen_inventory.name: Workspace Settings
screen_inventory.purpose: Manage users, roles, workspace settings, and future integration settings.

ux_decisions.decision: Use a separate Import Review Wizard rather than embedding import correction inside Asset Library.
ux_decisions.rationale: Import staging is architecturally separate and has unique validation states.

ux_decisions.decision: Use a dedicated Quote Builder instead of a generic generated-output editor.
ux_decisions.rationale: Quote is the first launch-critical output.

ux_risks.risk: Pricing workspace could become too abstract for non-finance users.
ux_risks.mitigation: Expose cost, price, margin, and approval state in plain operational labels.

stage_5_handoff_notes: Treat SCREEN-001 through SCREEN-013 as launch-critical route inventory.
